title: Concept Art Enhancements
description: Lots of enhancements inspired by the amazing concept art for the game!
body:
Concept art for Minecraft shown since 1.17 has been fantastic, but it doesn't always translate as-is into the game. In an attempt to put some of its beauty in the game, this texture changes things that have shown up in concept art in order to resemble it more.

There are also some other changes to flesh this out more. This is increasingly necessary now that Mojang is afraid to show off concept art due to potential backlash.

This is now my more cohesive game-enhancement pack in general and should not be too crazy. Textures have been made with details from the originals in mind, and they're meant to blend in with Vanilla.

I hope you enjoy! Feel free to leave constructive feedback and report issues. Also, stay tuned after the next update if they reveal any concept art!

***Do not reupload. If you somehow want to modify or use my assets for something you published, please confirm with me first! =D***


Warning: To make some things how I want them, I had to change multiple models. If you have a pack which changes azaleas over this one, it may break. You may also find the dripleaves weird if you have your own textures. You will need to delete the models or block models folder in this pack in order for your other textures to work.
